# MaxRecent6 Pblock14 Handoff48 Contract

## MaxRecent 6
maxRecentSizeRatio defaults to 0.06 so full compact keeps a denser recent window

## Pblock 14/7
parallel summarize threshold/target defaults to 14k/7k for denser block summaries

## Handoff 48
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.48 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Evidence path
